message:
engine: harden pager lock handling and add INSERT VALUES direct parse path

In fsqlite-pager, replace bare `.unwrap()` on the LabRuntime scheduler
mutex with `.expect("LabRuntime scheduler lock poisoned")` to surface
actionable context if the lock is ever poisoned during deterministic
task scheduling in tests.

In fsqlite-parser, add an explicit `else if` branch in `parse_insert_stmt`
to handle `INSERT INTO ... VALUES (...)` directly via `parse_values_core()`
rather than falling through to the full `parse_select_stmt` path. Previously,
`INSERT ... VALUES` was parsed as a SELECT wrapping VALUES rows, which added
an unnecessary indirection layer. The new path returns `InsertSource::Values`
directly, matching the AST more faithfully and avoiding the unreachable
`SelectCore::Select` arm.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
